optionsHelp.poisson: Self-consistent nonlinear Poisson; computes ψ(x) with Boltzmann carrier statistics.
optionsHelp.depletion: Depletion approximation; fast analytic-like solve, ignores mobile carriers in bulk.
optionsHelp.drift_diffusion: Drift–diffusion via Gummel iteration; couples Poisson with carrier continuity.

optionsHelp.Si: Silicon: Eg ≈ 1.12 eV at 300 K; default for most PN demos.
optionsHelp.Ge: Germanium: smaller bandgap; higher intrinsic carrier density at room temperature.

optionsHelp.abrupt: Step junction: constant Na on P-side, Nd on N-side.
optionsHelp.linear_graded: Linear grading of net doping across the transition region.
optionsHelp.gaussian: Gaussian doping profile centered at the metallurgical junction.
optionsHelp.piecewise: User-defined piecewise or tabulated doping profile.

optionsHelp.newton: Full Newton steps; fast near the solution but may diverge with poor initial guesses.
optionsHelp.damped_newton: Damped Newton; scales updates for stability in strongly nonlinear regions.
optionsHelp.newton_line_search: Newton with line search; picks step size to reduce residual each iteration.

optionsHelp.direct: Sparse direct LU; robust for 1D meshes up to a few thousand nodes.
optionsHelp.iterative: Iterative linear solver; useful for very large systems (future 2D/3D).

optionsHelp.rules: Deterministic rule-based agent; no LLM, predictable decisions.
optionsHelp.deepseek: DeepSeek LLM interprets probes and suggests actions.
optionsHelp.hybrid: LLM proposes actions; rules validate and enforce safety constraints.

optionsHelp.recommend_next: Stop when the agent emits a recommend_next decision.
optionsHelp.never: Run all trials regardless of agent recommendations.
